Interface IAGSServerConnectionName2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GISClient
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GISClient.dll

Provides access to members that supply GIS server connection name information.

[Guid("C65DC76B-B454-4B35-83EC-E9082B57A56F")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IAGSServerConnectionName2 : IAGSServerConnectionName

Properties

ConnectionProperties 

IPropertySet ConnectionProperties { get; set; }

Property Value

IPropertySet

ConnectionString

The connection properties of the GIS server connection.

string ConnectionString { get; set; }

Property Value

string

ConnectionType 

esriAGSConnectionType ConnectionType { get; }

The programmatic ID of the server connection factory.

string ServerConnectionFactoryProgID { get; set; }
